item.title: Reimu
item.description: Yes, this is a shitpost (I have lost my mind after the final exam of the 12th grade first semester). About the gif below, I used media-to-ascii to convert the original to ascii video. Reimu dancing Reimu hugging Reimu in the Winter

item.title: Website's History
item.description: 1.0: Release date: June 2023. This is the first version of my website, when I started to learn front-end development. I glad it worked when I saw it appeared on my phone. Go to page 2.0 & 3.0: Release date: July 2023. As a beginner, I wanted to practice more with more complexity, so I made 2.0 and 3.0. Struggled while trying to make it responsive on other devices. Go to page 4.

item.title: How to install Oh My Posh on Windows
item.description: About Oh My Posh Oh My Posh is a prompt theme engine for any shell, makes your terminal looks better than its default interface. For example: Installation Oh My Posh: To download ohmyposh.exe and all the themes, open a powershell window and run: winget install JanDeDobbeleer.OhMyPosh -s winget Font: After that, you will need a suitable font. I recommend you should use Fire Code font. Setting up Font: You can change the font on the terminal by doing:

item.title: My PC's Configuration
item.description: Editor: Visual Studio Code Extensions: Theme: One Dark Pro Competitive Programming Helper: Runs many testcases at once. CodeSnap: Take beautiful screenshots of your code. Tools: Oh My Posh: Custom Windows terminal, you can read my note on how to install Oh My Posh here. PowerTunnel: An extensible proxy server. Notepad++: Extra text editor. K-Lite Codec: Media player. Osu skin: Shiro Seijo

item.title: About site
item.description: Hosting on Github. Static site generator: hugo. Template: risotto (modified). Theme color: catppuccin (mocha). Domain by: is-a.dev. Source code available at caodoc/caodoc.github.io.

item.title: Repositories
item.description: List of my Github’s repositories. ASCII A front-end ASCII table. Calculator A front-end calculator. CIANS Stands for C++ In A Nutshell, a place to keep my code of solved problems on Codeforces, LeetCode, VNOJ, etc. Clock A front-end clock. Documents My collection of homework, althogrim, document. Miola A Discord python bot, made with the disnake library. Neon A website that my friend made for K12 NQD in THPTQG 2023. Good luck!
